final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original surrealist dreamscape illustration with philosophical depth and visual impact.

Style/medium: surrealist oil painting in the spirit of Salvador Dalí, hyper-detailed dreamscape illustration with symbolic elements
Composition: wide panoramic view, slightly low horizon line, multiple focal points arranged in depth layers from foreground to infinite sky
Subject: colossal moon rising from ocean surface, humpback whales flying through misty air, melting pocket watch draped over invisible surface, spiral stone staircase ascending into cumulus clouds
Scene/backdrop: twilight seascape merging with dream sky, calm reflective ocean surface, stratospheric cloud layers dissolving into cosmic void
Lighting/mood: soft diffused moonlight as primary source, subtle rim lighting on whales, mysterious and contemplative atmosphere suggesting subconscious exploration
Color palette: deep indigo and ultramarine as base, warm amber moon as anchor, pale gold and silver highlights, muted teal for ocean
Materials/textures: viscous melting metal for clock, matte stone for staircase, wet luminous skin on whales, powdery soft clouds
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, 8K stuffer labels, generic fantasy art style, oversaturated colors, cheerful mood, literal interpretation
